Backup timing, everywhere you look.

## See how long every backup took

- **The dashboard run history now shows each run's start time, end time and total duration.** Previously only the latest backup per container carried the timing and the full log showed just the start. Now every entry reads `start → end (duration)`, so you can review the runtime of every container and VM backup at a glance — the complete history in one place. (#50)
- **Each container and VM gets a "Recent runs" list.** Open the **Backups** section on any container or VM and you'll see its most recent backups with start → end and duration, so per-item timing lives right on the domain page, not just the dashboard. (#50)

Thanks to @ptmorris1 for the suggestion.
